eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Shawnee, KS; at 1:58 PM on APR 1, 2019 Effective until 2:13 PM. Message from SNCO EOC.
extra_text: This is a test.  This is only a test of the Shawnee County IPAWS System. EM6 No response is required.
